name: Avalon GloboCare Corp.
business: The company operates through two segments: a consumer health technology segment distributing the Keto Air breathalyzer device in North America, and an artificial intelligence content technology segment operating the RPM platform, an AI-driven short-form video generation platform aimed at content creators.
sellsTo: North American consumers for Keto Air breathalyzer
Content creators and marketers for RPM platform

exposures.sentence: Our consumer health technology segment is centered on the Keto Air breathalyzer device, a non-invasive consumer health product that allows users to determine whether they are in a state of nutritional ketosis, and at what level, by exhaling into a compact, pen-like breathalyzer.
The RPM platform is an AI-driven, short-form video generation software.

catalysts.event: Launch of Phase 2 of RPM platform
catalysts.sentence: Phase 2 of the RPM platform is currently in development and is expected to launch in Q3 of 2026.
